sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: (GSEE) as a Liquidity Pulse for Institutional Tactics

feed.title: FactSet appoints Joshua Warren CFO as Helen Shan departs
feed.summary: FactSet has appointed Joshua Warren as its new Chief Financial Officer, effective immediately. Warren previously served as FactSet's Senior Vice President, Head of Investor Relations and Treasurer. He succeeds Helen Shan, who is departing from her position.

feed.title: Altria Group Inc. stock (US02209S1033): Why Google Discover changes matter more now for tobacco inve
feed.summary: Google's 2026 Discover Core Update is revolutionizing how investors receive financial news, particularly for companies like Altria Group Inc. (NYSE:MO). This update delivers proactive, mobile-first insights on Altria's performance, smokeless product growth, and dividend strength directly to users' feeds, offering a faster edge on market trends without requiring a manual search. By prioritizing E-E-A-T content and tailoring information based on user activity, the update provides investors with timely analysis on crucial metrics, regulatory responses, and strategic shifts, accelerating their decision-making process for Altria stock.

feed.title: McKesson Corporation stock (US58155Q1031): Why Google Discover changes matter more now
feed.summary: Google's 2026 Discover Core Update is significantly changing how investors receive news and insights about McKesson Corporation stock, shifting towards proactive, personalized mobile feeds. This update is crucial for tracking McKesson due to its central role in North American pharmaceutical distribution and the current intense scrutiny on healthcare logistics. The emphasis on E-E-A-T-driven content with scannable visuals and actionable intelligence directly delivered to mobile devices empowers investors with faster, more tailored information, leveling the playing field for retail investors.
